perks.name: Magicka Weave
perks.description: Gain 50 Magicka and 25% Magicka Regeneration, doubled in Lich form. In Lich form, you are surrounded by a Magicka Weave.

perks.name: Frozen Cadavers
perks.description: You may control an additional summoned or reanimated undead. Nearby allied reanimated undead gain 150 Armor and 10% Magic Resist, and are empowered when struck by Frost spells.

perks.name: Hardened Weave
perks.description: Your Magicka Weave partially resists incoming physical damage, converting it to Magicka damage. You gain 150 Armor in Lich form.

perks.name: Mirror Weave
perks.description: Your Magicka Weave has a chance based on your Magicka to retaliate against hostile spells. You gain 10% Magic Resist.

perks.name: Flesh Transcendence
perks.description: Necrotic Rejuvenation is stronger, and you may change your appearance in both Lich and humanoid form.

perks.name: One Body
perks.description: If you would take physical damage, it is first mitigated among your commanded reanimated undead.

perks.name: Supreme Weave
perks.description: You regenerate Magicka faster while you have 50% or less of your maximum Magicka. Gain additional Magicka Regeneration, doubled in Lich form.

perks.name: Wraith Form
perks.description: Grants the "Wraith Form" power in Lich form. At will, become Ethereal and absorb the essence of fallen creatures, regaining 50 Health, Magicka, and Stamina when a creature dies.

perks.name: Join the March
perks.description: If an enemy would die within 3 seconds of receiving physical damage from an allied reanimated undead, it is revived under that undead's control.

perks.name: Dark Pact
perks.description: Dark Pact lets you temporarily gain Magicka Regeneration in exchange for maximum Health.

perks.name: Spirit of Midnight
perks.description: Grants the "Spirit of Midnight" spell. At will, summon a spirit of midnight to aid you in combat until it is slain.
